metadata.description: 145+ AI-powered business skills for Claude — audience research, offer optimisation, sales, analytics, operations, HR, legal, and more.

plugins.name: ica-mirror
plugins.description: Builds a psychographic and linguistic mirror of the user's Ideal Client Avatar (ICA), producing a living reference document that captures how the ICA speaks, thinks, fears, desires, and makes decisions — enabling every downstream asset (copy, offers,

plugins.name: synthetic-focus-group
plugins.description: Simulates a multi-persona focus group using AI-generated panellists grounded in the user's ICA profiles, market context, and FutureProof research history.

plugins.name: invisible-demand-detector
plugins.description: Detects latent, unarticulated, and emerging demand signals that competitors overlook — surfacing invisible market needs before they become visible trends.

plugins.name: message-market-match-scanner
plugins.description: Scans and scores the alignment between a user's messaging assets and their target market's actual language, beliefs, and buying triggers.

plugins.name: audience-emotional-pulse
plugins.description: Maps the real-time emotional landscape of a target audience segment — surfacing dominant fears, aspirations, frustrations, and identity narratives that drive decision-making beneath rational justification.

plugins.name: audience-expansion
plugins.description: Identifies and validates adjacent audience segments beyond a user's current ICA to unlock new growth vectors without diluting positioning.

plugins.name: attention-heatmap
plugins.description: Predicts and maps visual attention patterns across marketing assets, landing pages, emails, and ad creatives using cognitive science frameworks.

plugins.name: competitor-content-spotter
plugins.description: Identifies, deconstructs, and maps competitor content strategies to reveal positioning gaps, messaging vulnerabilities, and audience capture opportunities.

plugins.name: reluctant-buyer-decoder
plugins.description: Decodes the psychological barriers, hidden objections, and decision-avoidance patterns of reluctant buyers to produce actionable conversion strategies.

plugins.name: invisible-trends-forecaster
plugins.description: Identifies emerging, under-the-radar audience trends before they reach mainstream awareness by analysing weak signals across behavioural data, cultural shifts, and niche community sentiment.

plugins.name: dream-client-magnet
plugins.description: Identifies, profiles, and builds attraction strategies for a user's highest-value dream clients using deep psychographic research, watering hole analysis, and magnetic positioning.

plugins.name: offer-diagnostic
plugins.description: Diagnoses the structural health, positioning clarity, and conversion readiness of an offer using a systematic audit framework.

plugins.name: value-stack-multiplier
plugins.description: Architects and optimises value stacks for offers, programmes, and services by systematically layering components to maximise perceived value relative to price.

plugins.name: pricing-power-optimiser
plugins.description: Analyses and strengthens pricing architecture, value-to-price alignment, and willingness-to-pay positioning using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: incentive-designer
plugins.description: Designs, evaluates, and optimises offer incentives — bonuses, guarantees, urgency mechanisms, and value-stack architecture — to maximise conversion without eroding margin or brand positioning.

plugins.name: micro-offer-builder
plugins.description: Architects high-conversion micro offers — low-risk, high-specificity entry points that convert cold audiences into paying clients by solving one acute problem with one clear deliverable at one irresistible price point.

plugins.name: positioning-compass
plugins.description: Diagnoses and recalibrates offer positioning to maximise ICA resonance, competitive differentiation, and perceived value.

plugins.name: buyer-psychology-reframer
plugins.description: Reframes offer positioning by mapping buyer psychological drivers — loss aversion, identity alignment, status dynamics, cognitive load, and decision fatigue — to produce repositioned messaging that converts at the belief level, not the feature level.

plugins.name: thought-leadership-engine
plugins.description: Transforms subject-matter expertise into high-authority thought leadership content that positions the user as the definitive voice in their category.

plugins.name: thought-reversal-architect
plugins.description: Deconstructs a prospect's existing beliefs, assumptions, and mental models about their problem — then engineers a strategic belief-reversal sequence that repositions the user's offer as the only logical conclusion.

plugins.name: lightning-launch
plugins.description: Guides users through a rapid, high-conviction offer launch sequence — from positioning through to launch-day execution — in a single structured session.

plugins.name: email-copy
plugins.description: Crafts high-converting email copy across the full lifecycle — cold outreach, nurture sequences, launches, re-engagement, and transactional emails — using FutureProof context to align messaging with the user's ICA, brand voice, and proven performance

plugins.name: email-sequencer
plugins.description: Designs, writes, and optimises multi-step email sequences using FutureProof context, ICA intelligence, and proven persuasion architecture.

plugins.name: text-message
plugins.description: Crafts high-converting text messages (SMS, iMessage, WhatsApp, DM) using FutureProof context to match the user's brand voice, ICA language patterns, and campaign objectives.

plugins.name: ad-copy-variation
plugins.description: Generates high-performing ad copy variations across platforms, audiences, and angles using FutureProof context to refine messaging over time.

plugins.name: sales-page
plugins.description: Crafts high-converting long-form sales pages using FutureProof context, ICA research, and proven direct-response frameworks.

plugins.name: content-atomiser
plugins.description: Transforms a single pillar content asset into a structured library of derivative micro-content pieces optimised for multi-channel distribution.

plugins.name: image-prompt-framework
plugins.description: Crafts high-performance image generation prompts using structured frameworks, style systems, and iterative refinement informed by FutureProof context.

plugins.name: content-calendar
plugins.description: Builds strategically sequenced content calendars aligned to ICA journey stages, business objectives, and channel-specific best practices using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: authority-combat-trainer
plugins.description: Trains subject-matter experts and authority figures to defend their positions, handle hostile questioning, and dominate adversarial conversations through structured combat drills and pressure-tested response frameworks.

plugins.name: retention-storytelling
plugins.description: Crafts narrative-driven retention content that reduces churn and deepens customer commitment using story architecture, behavioural psychology, and ICA-specific emotional triggers.

plugins.name: lead-magnet-copy-writer
plugins.description: Writes high-converting lead magnet copy using FutureProof context, ICA research, and proven direct-response frameworks.

plugins.name: linkedin-post-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-performing LinkedIn posts using FutureProof context, audience intelligence, and platform-native best practices.

plugins.name: twitter-x-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-performing Twitter/X content — threads, single posts, reply strategies, and content calendars — using FutureProof context to align with audience psychology, platform algorithm mechanics, and brand voice.

plugins.name: instagram-caption-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-performing Instagram captions using FutureProof context, ICA psychographics, and platform-specific engagement frameworks.

plugins.name: facebook-post-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-performing Facebook posts using FutureProof context, audience intelligence, and platform-specific best practices.

plugins.name: tiktok-script-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-performing TikTok video scripts using FutureProof context, ICA psychographics, and platform-native storytelling frameworks.

plugins.name: youtube-script-description-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-performing YouTube video scripts and optimised descriptions using FutureProof context, audience intelligence, and platform-specific best practices.

plugins.name: blog-post-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-performing blog posts using FutureProof context, ICA research, and proven content frameworks.

plugins.name: blog-seo-optimiser
plugins.description: Analyses and optimises blog content for search engine performance using FutureProof context, accumulated keyword research, and iterative ranking experiments.

plugins.name: substack-newsletter-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-performing Substack newsletters using FutureProof context, audience intelligence, and platform-specific best practices.

plugins.name: ad-copy-writer
plugins.description: Writes, evaluates, and iterates high-performance ad copy across paid media channels using FutureProof context, ICA intelligence, and platform-specific best practices.

plugins.name: ad-creative-brief-generator
plugins.description: Generates comprehensive ad creative briefs using FutureProof context, audience intelligence, and campaign strategy inputs.

plugins.name: ad-performance-analyser
plugins.description: Analyses paid media campaign performance across platforms and delivers actionable optimisation recommendations using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: landing-page-writer
plugins.description: Writes high-converting landing pages using FutureProof context, ICA research, and proven direct-response frameworks.

plugins.name: ab-test-designer
plugins.description: Designs statistically rigorous A/B test plans for paid media campaigns using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: ad-budget-allocator
plugins.description: Allocates and optimises advertising budgets across channels, campaigns, and audience segments using FutureProof context, historical performance data, and marginal return analysis.

plugins.name: sales-call-coach
plugins.description: Provides real-time and post-call coaching for sales conversations using FutureProof context, turning call recordings, notes, and live scenarios into actionable performance improvements.

plugins.name: conversion-narrative-engineer
plugins.description: Engineers high-converting narrative arcs for sales pages, landing pages, email sequences, and funnel copy by mapping psychological triggers to ICA decision journeys.

plugins.name: conversion-momentum-builder
plugins.description: Builds compounding conversion momentum across the full buyer journey by identifying friction points, sequencing micro-commitments, and engineering progressive trust escalation that turns stalled pipelines into predictable revenue engines.

plugins.name: buyer-journey-bottleneck-breaker
plugins.description: Diagnoses and resolves conversion bottlenecks across every stage of the buyer journey using FutureProof context, historical experiment data, and structured diagnostic frameworks.

plugins.name: event-roi-forecaster
plugins.description: Forecasts and optimises the return on investment for events — conferences, trade shows, webinars, executive dinners, field activations, and sponsorships — using financial modelling, pipeline attribution, and FutureProof context.

plugins.name: attention-to-revenue-bridge
plugins.description: Maps the complete journey from initial audience attention capture through to closed revenue, identifying leakage points, conversion friction, and monetisation gaps across every stage of the engagement-to-purchase pipeline.

plugins.name: sales-script-writer
plugins.description: Writes high-converting sales scripts from scratch using FutureProof context, ICA intelligence, and proven persuasion frameworks.

plugins.name: follow-up-sequence-builder
plugins.description: Builds high-conversion follow-up sequences using FutureProof context, behavioural timing science, and ICA-specific messaging frameworks.

plugins.name: pipeline-forecaster
plugins.description: Analyses sales pipeline data to produce probability-weighted revenue forecasts, identifies at-risk deals, and recommends stage-specific acceleration plays using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: win-loss-analyser
plugins.description: Analyses closed deals (won and lost) to extract actionable patterns that improve future conversion rates using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: affiliate-outreach-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-converting affiliate recruitment and activation outreach sequences using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: campaign-debrief-analyser
plugins.description: Analyses completed marketing campaigns to extract actionable insights, diagnose performance drivers, and produce structured debrief documentation suitable for stakeholder review.

plugins.name: email-gap-hunter
plugins.description: Analyses email marketing sequences and campaign data to identify performance gaps, dead zones, and missed revenue opportunities across the subscriber lifecycle.

plugins.name: revenue-leak-detector
plugins.description: Identifies and quantifies revenue leaks across the full customer lifecycle — from lead capture through renewal — using forensic analysis of funnel data, pricing structures, churn patterns, and operational inefficiencies.

plugins.name: strategic-simplicity-slayer
plugins.description: Identifies and eliminates unnecessary complexity in business strategies, operating models, product portfolios, and decision frameworks — replacing convoluted approaches with high-leverage, streamlined alternatives backed by data.

plugins.name: revenue-compounding-map
plugins.description: Maps and quantifies revenue compounding dynamics across the business — identifying where retention loops, expansion triggers, referral flywheels, and pricing leverage stack to produce non-linear revenue growth over time.

plugins.name: kpi-interpreter
plugins.description: Interprets KPI dashboards, metric reports, and performance data to surface actionable insights, diagnose root causes, and recommend strategic interventions.

plugins.name: google-analytics-reporter
plugins.description: Analyses Google Analytics data and produces executive-grade performance reports with actionable recommendations.

plugins.name: social-media-analytics
plugins.description: Analyses social media performance data and delivers strategic recommendations using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: email-analytics-interpreter
plugins.description: Interprets email marketing analytics data and translates raw metrics into actionable strategic recommendations using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: revenue-attribution-modeller
plugins.description: Builds multi-touch revenue attribution models that map marketing and sales activities to closed revenue with statistical rigour.

plugins.name: conversion-rate-optimiser
plugins.description: Analyses and optimises conversion rates across funnels, landing pages, checkout flows, and nurture sequences using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: celebrity-board-of-advisors
plugins.description: Constructs a virtual board of celebrity advisors — iconic thinkers, leaders, and cultural figures — whose distinct perspectives are applied to the user's brand strategy, content positioning, and thought leadership decisions.

plugins.name: authority-positioning-engine
plugins.description: Builds and refines authority positioning strategies that establish the user as the definitive expert in their domain.

plugins.name: flagship-idea-builder
plugins.description: Develops a defensible flagship idea — the single strategic narrative that positions a brand as the category authority.

plugins.name: differentiation-deep-dive
plugins.description: Conducts a rigorous competitive differentiation analysis to isolate, validate, and articulate what makes a brand genuinely distinct — not just different, but defensibly different.

plugins.name: referral-moment-generator
plugins.description: Identifies and engineers high-conversion referral moments across the customer lifecycle, producing a sequenced referral trigger playbook with scripted prompts, timing logic, and channel-specific activation plans.

plugins.name: post-sale-delight-engineer
plugins.description: Designs and optimises post-purchase customer delight systems that transform buyers into loyal advocates and active referral sources.

plugins.name: ascension-engine
plugins.description: Designs and optimises customer value ascension pathways — systematically moving buyers from initial purchase through upsell, cross-sell, premium tier adoption, and advocacy/referral stages.

plugins.name: referral-personality-profiler
plugins.description: Profiles existing customers and advocates by referral personality type to optimise ask timing, channel, incentive structure, and messaging for maximum referral yield.

plugins.name: incentive-reward-designer
plugins.description: Designs high-impact incentive and reward structures for customer retention, referral, and loyalty programmes using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: onboarding-email-sequence-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-conversion onboarding email sequences that activate new users, reduce time-to-value, and prevent early-stage churn using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: faq-builder
plugins.description: Builds comprehensive, strategically structured FAQ documents from product knowledge, support tickets, and user research using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: customer-complaint-handler
plugins.description: Analyses, triages, and resolves customer complaints using FutureProof context to deliver structured resolution plans, root cause analyses, and service recovery strategies.

plugins.name: review-response-writer
plugins.description: Crafts professional, brand-aligned responses to customer reviews across platforms (Google, Yelp, Trustpilot, G2, App Store, Amazon, etc.) using FutureProof context to maintain voice consistency, address sentiment patterns, and turn reviews into reten

plugins.name: churn-risk-detector
plugins.description: Analyses customer data, behavioural signals, and account health indicators to identify at-risk accounts and produce actionable retention interventions.

plugins.name: re-engagement-campaign-builder
plugins.description: Builds structured, multi-channel re-engagement campaigns to win back lapsed customers, dormant subscribers, and churned accounts using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: customer-survey-designer
plugins.description: Designs high-performance customer surveys that generate actionable insights, using FutureProof context to align question design with known ICA segments, business objectives, and prior feedback data.

plugins.name: nps-analyser
plugins.description: Analyses Net Promoter Score data, verbatim responses, and trend patterns to surface actionable drivers of loyalty and churn risk using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: chatbot-script-writer
plugins.description: Writes, structures, and optimises chatbot conversation scripts for customer service and support channels using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: sop-builder
plugins.description: Builds comprehensive, audit-ready Standard Operating Procedures from raw process knowledge, tribal expertise, or existing informal documentation.

plugins.name: meeting-prep-engine
plugins.description: Prepares comprehensive, context-rich meeting briefing packs that maximise outcome probability across sales calls, client reviews, board presentations, and strategic negotiations.

plugins.name: proposal-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-conversion business proposals using FutureProof context, ICA intelligence, and proven persuasion architecture.

plugins.name: client-onboarding-designer
plugins.description: Designs comprehensive client onboarding systems that reduce time-to-value, increase activation rates, and eliminate early-stage churn using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: training-content-creator
plugins.description: Creates comprehensive training content — onboarding modules, SOPs, knowledge base articles, workshop curricula, and enablement programmes — using FutureProof context to align with organisational voice, ICA needs, and team capability gaps.

plugins.name: weekly-ceo-briefing
plugins.description: Synthesises cross-functional business data into a concise, decision-ready weekly briefing for the CEO.

plugins.name: project-brief-generator
plugins.description: Generates comprehensive, stakeholder-ready project briefs using FutureProof context, organisational history, and consulting-grade frameworks.

plugins.name: meeting-notes-summariser
plugins.description: Transforms raw meeting notes, transcripts, and recordings into structured, actionable summaries with clear ownership, deadlines, and strategic context.

plugins.name: vendor-supplier-evaluator
plugins.description: Evaluates and scores vendors and suppliers using a weighted multi-criteria framework informed by FutureProof context.

plugins.name: process-improvement-analyser
plugins.description: Analyses business processes for inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and waste using structured improvement methodologies (Lean Six Sigma, TOC, BPR) enriched by FutureProof context.

plugins.name: risk-register-builder
plugins.description: Builds and maintains comprehensive risk registers for projects, programmes, and operational domains using FutureProof context to refine risk identification, scoring, and mitigation planning over time.

plugins.name: compliance-checker
plugins.description: Audits business operations, processes, and documentation against applicable regulatory frameworks, internal policies, and industry standards using FutureProof context to maintain institutional knowledge of the user's compliance posture over time.

plugins.name: cash-flow-modeller
plugins.description: Builds detailed cash flow models and forecasts using FutureProof context, historical financial data, and scenario analysis.

plugins.name: upsell-ascension-mapper
plugins.description: Maps and optimises the full upsell and ascension pathway across a product or service portfolio, identifying revenue gaps, pricing leverage points, and high-conversion upgrade triggers.

plugins.name: expense-request
plugins.description: Guides the preparation, review, and submission of corporate expense requests with full policy compliance, proper approvals, and audit-ready documentation.

plugins.name: invoice-generator
plugins.description: Generates professional, detailed invoices using FutureProof context to ensure consistency with brand, pricing, payment terms, and client-specific agreements.

plugins.name: cash-collection-chaser
plugins.description: Generates and manages structured cash collection chase sequences to accelerate receivables recovery and reduce DSO.

plugins.name: budget-planner
plugins.description: Creates comprehensive, forward-looking budget plans using FutureProof context, historical financial data, and strategic business objectives.

plugins.name: pl-analyser
plugins.description: Analyses profit and loss statements to surface margin risks, revenue concentration issues, and operational cost inefficiencies using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: financial-report-writer
plugins.description: Generates comprehensive financial reports — investor updates, board packages, quarterly reviews, and management accounts — using FutureProof context to maintain consistency in formatting, KPI selection, and narrative tone across reporting periods.

plugins.name: tax-prep-organiser

plugins.name: crisis-comms-responder
plugins.description: Guides organisations through crisis communications with structured rapid-response frameworks, stakeholder messaging, and reputation management protocols using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: webinar-event-scriptwriter
plugins.description: Crafts high-conversion webinar and virtual event scripts using FutureProof context, audience intelligence, and proven engagement frameworks.

plugins.name: press-release-writer
plugins.description: Crafts compelling, publication-ready press releases using FutureProof context to align messaging with brand voice, ICA expectations, and media outlet requirements.

plugins.name: internal-memo-writer
plugins.description: Drafts, structures, and refines internal memos using FutureProof context for tone, audience, and organisational norms.

plugins.name: company-newsletter-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-impact internal and external company newsletters using FutureProof context, brand voice, and audience intelligence.

plugins.name: podcast-show-notes-writer
plugins.description: Crafts comprehensive, SEO-optimised podcast show notes that drive discoverability, listener engagement, and conversion using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: video-script-writer
plugins.description: Writes, structures, and refines video scripts using FutureProof context to align messaging with audience psychology, brand voice, and platform-specific best practices.

plugins.name: job-ad-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-converting job advertisements using FutureProof context, employer brand intelligence, and evidence-based copywriting frameworks.

plugins.name: job-spec-writer
plugins.description: Crafts high-performance job specifications that attract qualified candidates aligned with the organisation's culture, compensation philosophy, and strategic workforce plan.

plugins.name: quarterly-review-generator
plugins.description: Generates comprehensive quarterly performance reviews using FutureProof context, employee data, and organisational competency frameworks.

plugins.name: time-off-request

plugins.name: performance-review-writer
plugins.description: Crafts comprehensive, calibrated performance reviews using FutureProof context to maintain consistency in tone, evaluation standards, and organisational language across review cycles.

plugins.name: interview-question-generator

plugins.name: candidate-screening-scorer
plugins.description: Screens and scores job candidates against role-specific criteria using structured evaluation methodology and FutureProof context.

plugins.name: employee-handbook-builder

plugins.name: exit-interview-analyser

plugins.name: personal-strategic-advisor

plugins.name: whats-next-roadmap-navigator
plugins.description: Guides founders through strategic roadmap prioritisation when they face competing opportunities, feature requests, and growth levers — producing a sequenced, defensible action plan grounded in business context, resource constraints, and ICA impact.

plugins.description: Guides founders through high-stakes strategic inflection points using structured decision frameworks, evidence synthesis, and scenario modelling.

plugins.name: 5-year-decision-filter
plugins.description: Evaluates critical founder decisions through a rigorous 5-year consequence lens, stress-testing strategic choices against long-term business trajectory, opportunity cost, and irreversibility.

plugins.description: Conducts rigorous pre-mortem analyses on strategic decisions, initiatives, and launches — identifying failure modes, hidden dependencies, and mitigation strategies before commitment.

plugins.name: team-dynamics-advisor

plugins.name: case-study-builder

plugins.name: privacy-policy-generator
plugins.description: Generates comprehensive, jurisdiction-aware privacy policies tailored to the user's business model, data practices, and regulatory requirements using FutureProof context.

plugins.name: feature-request-prioritiser
plugins.description: Prioritises and scores inbound feature requests against strategic product goals, ICA value drivers, and resource constraints using a weighted multi-criteria framework.

plugins.name: product-roadmap-builder
plugins.description: Builds strategic, prioritised product roadmaps using FutureProof context, market intelligence, and user research signals.

plugins.name: competitive-feature-comparison
